[retrieve_value] How many MQLs were there?
→ 3870

[funnel_conversion] What is the conversion rate from Clicks to Leads?
→ 39.0%
Leads (6,733) / Clicks (17,257) = 39.0%.
[compute_difference] How many were lost between MQLs and SQLs?
→ 2009

→ 1.15%
Opportunities (916) / Impressions (80,000) = 1.15%.
[diagnostic] Which funnel stage transition has the largest drop-off (the bottleneck)?
→ Impressions to Clicks
Compare step conversion rates; Impressions->Clicks is lowest at 21.6%, the biggest leak in the funnel.

Leads59090

[retrieve_value] How many SQLs were there?
→ 6726
Read the SQLs stage of the funnel: 6,726.
[funnel_conversion] What is the conversion rate from Leads to MQLs?
→ 41.5%
MQLs (24,519) / Leads (59,090) = 41.5%.

→ 190910
Clicks (250,000) - Leads (59,090) = 190,910 lost.

→ 2.69%
SQLs (6,726) / Clicks (250,000) = 2.69%.
[diagnostic] Which funnel stage transition has the largest drop-off (the bottleneck)?
→ Clicks to Leads
Compare step conversion rates; Clicks->Leads is lowest at 23.6%, the biggest leak in the funnel.

mkt_64e49659b2c4 · funnel · medium · part1_marketing
StageCount
Impressions100000

Leads13653
MQLs5322
SQLs2930
[retrieve_value] How many MQLs were there?
→ 5322
Read the MQLs stage of the funnel: 5,322.
[funnel_conversion] What is the conversion rate from Clicks to Leads?
→ 36.6%
Leads (13,653) / Clicks (37,349) = 36.6%.
[compute_difference] How many were lost between MQLs and SQLs?
→ 2392
MQLs (5,322) - SQLs (2,930) = 2,392 lost.
[funnel_conversion] What is the overall conversion rate from Impressions to SQLs?
→ 2.93%
SQLs (2,930) / Impressions (100,000) = 2.93%.
[diagnostic] Which funnel stage transition has the largest drop-off (the bottleneck)?
→ Clicks to Leads
Compare step conversion rates; Clicks->Leads is lowest at 36.6%, the biggest leak in the funnel.

→ Leads to MQLs

→ 29.3%

→ Impressions to Clicks
Compare step conversion rates; Impressions->Clicks is lowest at 19.3%, the biggest leak in the funnel.

→ 52.9%

→ 50087

→ 2.13%
Opportunities (2,130) / Clicks (100,000) = 2.13%.
[diagnostic] Which funnel stage transition has the largest drop-off (the bottleneck)?
→ SQLs to Opportunities
Compare step conversion rates; SQLs->Opportunities is lowest at 27.3%, the biggest leak in the funnel.

→ 2762

[funnel_conversion] What is the conversion rate from MQLs to SQLs?
→ 46.3%
SQLs (4,900) / MQLs (10,591) = 46.3%.

→ 2138

→ 3.1%
Closed-Won (1,550) / Clicks (50,000) = 3.1%.

→ Clicks to Leads

[funnel_conversion] What is the conversion rate from Leads to MQLs?
→ 45.9%
MQLs (30,325) / Leads (66,024) = 45.9%.
[compute_difference] How many were lost between Impressions and Clicks?
→ 337308
Impressions (500,000) - Clicks (162,692) = 337,308 lost.
[funnel_conversion] What is the overall conversion rate from Impressions to MQLs?
→ 6.07%
MQLs (30,325) / Impressions (500,000) = 6.07%.
[diagnostic] Which funnel stage transition has the largest drop-off (the bottleneck)?
→ Impressions to Clicks
Compare step conversion rates; Impressions->Clicks is lowest at 32.5%, the biggest leak in the funnel.

[funnel_conversion] What is the conversion rate from MQLs to SQLs?
→ 37.0%

→ 405627

→ 1.77%
SQLs (8,873) / Clicks (500,000) = 1.77%.

→ Clicks to Leads
Compare step conversion rates; Clicks->Leads is lowest at 18.9%, the biggest leak in the funnel.

StageCount
Impressions100000

Opportunities692
Closed-Won353
[retrieve_value] How many MQLs were there?
→ 3027
Read the MQLs stage of the funnel: 3,027.
[funnel_conversion] What is the conversion rate from SQLs to Opportunities?
→ 40.1%
Opportunities (692) / SQLs (1,726) = 40.1%.
[compute_difference] How many were lost between MQLs and SQLs?
→ 1301
MQLs (3,027) - SQLs (1,726) = 1,301 lost.
[funnel_conversion] What is the overall conversion rate from Impressions to Closed-Won?
→ 0.35%
Closed-Won (353) / Impressions (100,000) = 0.35%.
[diagnostic] Which funnel stage transition has the largest drop-off (the bottleneck)?
→ Clicks to Leads
Compare step conversion rates; Clicks->Leads is lowest at 21.8%, the biggest leak in the funnel.

Read the Clicks stage of the funnel: 250,000.
[funnel_conversion] What is the conversion rate from Clicks to Leads?
→ 24.5%
Leads (61,135) / Clicks (250,000) = 24.5%.
[compute_difference] How many were lost between Leads and MQLs?
→ 24701
Leads (61,135) - MQLs (36,434) = 24,701 lost.
[funnel_conversion] What is the overall conversion rate from Clicks to Opportunities?
→ 2.04%
Opportunities (5,096) / Clicks (250,000) = 2.04%.
[diagnostic] Which funnel stage transition has the largest drop-off (the bottleneck)?
→ Clicks to Leads
Compare step conversion rates; Clicks->Leads is lowest at 24.5%, the biggest leak in the funnel.

→ 100000

[funnel_conversion] What is the conversion rate from Opportunities to Closed-Won?
→ 25.3%

[compute_difference] How many were lost between SQLs and Opportunities?
→ 9138

[funnel_conversion] What is the overall conversion rate from Leads to Closed-Won?
→ 1.83%
Closed-Won (1,826) / Leads (100,000) = 1.83%.
[diagnostic] Which funnel stage transition has the largest drop-off (the bottleneck)?
→ Opportunities to Closed-Won
Compare step conversion rates; Opportunities->Closed-Won is lowest at 25.3%, the biggest leak in the funnel.
